activity:
7:00 AM – Morning Review of Overnight Screening Data and Prioritized Patient List  
The provider begins the day by reviewing electronic health record (EHR) alerts from overnight prenatal screenings, focusing on patients who scored positive on the T-ACE or AUDIT-C alcohol screening tools during their last visit or who have missing responses. The provider flags three patients for same-day counseling and prepares tailored educational materials on alcohol’s impact on fetal brain development.
